average views in india: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('IN')
how are views distributed across regions: SELECT region, SUM(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region
average views in pakistan: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('PK')
average views in united states: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('US')
average views in usa: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('US')
average views in canada: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('CA')
which language performs best overall?: SELECT language, SUM(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY language ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC LIMIT 1
show views, likes and comments by region: SELECT region, SUM(views), SUM(likes), SUM(comments) FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region
views by regions: SELECT region, SUM(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region
which region performs the best in terms: SELECT region, SUM(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC LIMIT 1
which region has the best overall engage: SELECT region, SUM(likes), SUM(comments), SUM(shares) FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY region ORDER BY SUM(likes) DESC LIMIT 1
what is the average views of videos in u: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('US')
average view in uk: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('UK')
average view in united kingdom: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('UK')
highlight the top performing category: SELECT category, SUM(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(views) DESC LIMIT 1
average views in japan: SELECT AVG(views) FROM youtube_videos_staging WHERE LOWER(region) = LOWER('JP')
